## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests: `pytest -q`
- [ ] Backend lint: `ruff check app tests`
- [ ] Frontend build: `npm run build`
- [ ] Docker config: `docker compose config --quiet`

## Operational Impact

Note any migrations, environment variables, local model requirements, deployment changes, or security implications.

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or local `.env` files are committed.
- [ ] Tenant boundaries are preserved where applicable.
- [ ] Docs are updated for user-facing changes.
- [ ] Tests or validation evidence are included.
